recommendations.title: What Have You Done to Solange?
recommendations.overview: After several Catholic school pupils are murdered, a teacher who is having an affair with one of his students becomes a suspect. When other gruesome murders start occurring shortly thereafter, the teacher suspects that he may be the cause of them.

recommendations.title: Art of the Devil
recommendations.overview: When Boom suffers abandonment and abuse by Prathan, she decides to use black magic to take revenge on him and his family.

recommendations.title: Dismissed
recommendations.overview: A straight-edged teacher finds trouble when an honors student is willing to do anything to get an A.

recommendations.title: Emergency
recommendations.overview: Ready for a night of legendary partying, three college students must weigh the pros and cons of calling the police when faced with an unexpected situation.

recommendations.title: Body Cam
recommendations.overview: As a police officer investigates the gruesome murder of her colleague, she discovers that a mysterious supernatural force is behind it.

recommendations.title: ChromeSkull: Laid to Rest 2
recommendations.overview: After his gruesome encounter with a girl, and being outmatched by his own assistant, ChromeSkull resurges with a horrifying massacre of his own.

recommendations.title: All Fun and Games
recommendations.overview: A group of Salem teens discover a cursed knife that unleashes a demon that forces them to play gruesome, deadly versions of childhood games where there can be no winners, only survivors.

recommendations.title: The Final
recommendations.overview: A group of high school outcasts get revenge on the students that torment them.

recommendations.title: ExTerminators
recommendations.overview: Three women from a rage-therapy group band together to dole out justice to the men who wronged them.

recommendations.title: In a Violent Nature
recommendations.overview: The enigmatic resurrection, rampage, and retribution of an undead monster in a remote wilderness unleashes an iconic new killer after a locket is removed from a collapsed fire tower that entombed its rotting corpse.
